next_steps: Open the web_ui_url from deploy output (https://dawarich.example.invalid when public_url is set).
Sign in with the default account and change the password immediately (upstream default: [email protected] / safepassword).
Configure mobile trackers (Dawarich iOS/Android or OwnTracks) to POST to your public URL.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/dawarich-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
After deploy: run bind maintain and nginx-waf maintain --site dawarich when plan dependencies are approved.
Keep HDC_DAWARICH_SECRET_KEY_BASE and HDC_DAWARICH_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing them makes the Postgres volume and sessions unrecoverable.
